title: Collar Installation for LI-COR 8200 Smart Chamber SOP
author: St Cyr, Malcom
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
TLI - Perennial Legumes Program  
  Document Title : Collar Installation for LI-COR 8200 Smart Chamber SOP 
  SOP_ID : TLI_PLP_10.5281/zenodo.13737988 
  Version : 0.1.0 
  Summary :  This procedure describes the dimensions and installation of soil collars used to measure soil gas fluxes with the LI-COR LI-7820 analyzer and the 8200 smart chamber combo.  The scope of this procedure is limited to the installation of the collars work with a LI-COR 8200 smart chamber.   The positioning of collars within the field is experiment-specific, therefore was not covered in this procedure.
